'''wamupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabaragoya|kabaragoya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabaragoya|kabaragoya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wamupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæmipith|wæmipith]] || [[word:wæmipij|wæmipij]] || [[word:wæmipish|wæmipish]] || [[word:wæmipi|wæmipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamumuputh|wamumuputh]] || [[word:wamumupuj|wamumupuj]] || [[word:wamumupush|wamumupush]] || [[word:wamumupu|wamumupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamuputh|wamuputh]] || [[word:wamupuj|wamupuj]] || [[word:wamupush|wamupush]] || [[word:wamupu|wamupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamufputh|wamufputh]] || [[word:wamufpuj|wamufpuj]] || [[word:wamufpush|wamufpush]] || [[word:wamufpuf|wamufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wamuputhu|wamuputhu]] || [[word:wamupuju|wamupuju]] || [[word:wamupushu|wamupushu]] || [[word:wamupuku|wamupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wamuputh|wamuputh]] || [[word:wamupuj|wamupuj]] || [[word:wamupush|wamupush]] || [[word:wamupu|wamupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wamuputhul|wamuputhul]] || [[word:wamupujul|wamupujul]] || [[word:wamupushul|wamupushul]] || [[word:wamupukul|wamupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wamuputhuthu|wamuputhuthu]] || [[word:wamupujuju|wamupujuju]] || [[word:wamupushushu|wamupushushu]] || [[word:wamupuku|wamupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wamuputhun|wamuputhun]] || [[word:wamupujun|wamupujun]] || [[word:wamupushun|wamupushun]] || [[word:wamupukun|wamupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wamuputhuoro|wamuputhuoro]] || [[word:wamupujuoro|wamupujuoro]] || [[word:wamupushuoro|wamupushuoro]] || [[word:wamupukuoro|wamupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
